📦 ShipNetwork Zone Map Widget

A responsive, embeddable USPS shipping zone calculator with multi-warehouse support. Works seamlessly on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

📱 Test Responsive Sizes:

💡 Tip: Resize your browser window or use DevTools device emulation to test responsiveness. On mobile devices, try the swipe-up bottom sheet for controls!

🔗 How to Embed:

Add this code to your website to embed the widget:

<!-- Step 1: Load ShipNetwork Zone Map Widget --> <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/YOUR-ORG/usps-zone-map@latest/dist/shipnetwork-zone-map.js"></script> <!-- Step 2: Add the Widget Element --> <shipnetwork-zone-map style="width: 100%; height: 600px;"> </shipnetwork-zone-map>
📝 Note: No external dependencies required! The widget is fully self-contained and works out of the box.

✨ Features:

  • 📱 Mobile Optimized: Bottom sheet UI with swipe gestures
  • 🏢 Multi-Warehouse: Select multiple warehouses to see optimal zones
  • 🎯 Zone Blending: Shows minimum zone from all selected warehouses
  • 📍 Custom ZIP: Calculate zones between any two ZIP codes
  • 🔒 Shadow DOM: Complete style isolation from host page
  • ⚡ Lightweight: Fast loading and smooth performance
